description: Fires when BTC is within 10% of a key Polymarket strike price AND volume on that market exceeds $50k. Agents get the strike, current price, gap%, YES price, expiry, and Octodamus directional signal — everything needed to assess the trade in one call.
what_it_delivers: JSON: {market_question, strike_price, current_btc_price, gap_pct, yes_price, expiry_hours, volume, octodamus_signal, octodamus_confidence, trade_recommendation: YES/NO/INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL}
